releaseNotes: Fixed the Live TV/Movies/TV Shows freezing, crashing, and slow loading: those screens were silently re-downloading the entire channel or catalog list every time you opened them, and switching between Guide and Live TV repeatedly kept piling up screens in the background instead of reusing them. Also fixed Settings > Manage channel groups trapping you in the search box on Firestick instead of letting you reach the toggles, restored the back button revealing categories in Guide by default, fixed the channel/movie grid resetting to the top instead of staying where you were after watching something, and added long-press to favorite a channel, movie, or TV show right from its tile. Verified in release-build testing on a real upgrade from an older install with no crashes.
